_comment: Synapse UI strings — PRIMARY language (English), the source of truth. Read by strings.py (Python) and injected into QML as `Tr` (qt_main.py). ko.json is a frozen snapshot that falls back here per missing key. Keys are screen-domain dotted; {0}/{name} are str.format placeholders. Glyphs (✕ + ▸ ◆ ●…) and the SYNAPSE wordmark / BPM unit are NOT keyed. See docs/string-i18n-plan.md.
boardSwitch.title: Switch Board
bank.emptyHint:
Pick a bank on the left, or
make one with + New Bank.
bank.boardsHint: Boards in this bank — order = footswitch A·B·C·D (first 4)
snapshot.title: Snapshots
tap.title: TAP TEMPO
tap.hint: Tap: any footswitch  ·  Exit: combo (both at once)
tuner.title: TUNER
saveAs.title: Save Snapshot As
saveAs.prompt: Tap a term below to get a name suggestion
saveAs.hintSuggested: ↑ Tap this name to save · tap a term again to re-roll
saveAs.hintEmpty: Tap a term for a suggestion with a random suffix
config.volHelp:
Software output gain (JACK). 100% = unity, below attenuates.
The board's physical knob is the final analog master.
config.volMissing: Gain stage not found (check the synapse-mastervol service).
config.bpbHelp: Beats per bar for the tap-tempo metronome (2–12).
system.warn:
Safely shut down / reboot the device.
Pulling power directly can corrupt the SD card.
system.confirmHint: Tap once more to run. (Cancel: tap outside the panel)
